flashcards.question: Mass Wasting
flashcards.answer: The downslope movement of rock and soil primarily driven by gravity

flashcards.question: Landslide
flashcards.answer: A rapid downslope movement of rock and/or soil along a failure surface

flashcards.question: Creep
flashcards.answer: Very slow, continuous downslope movement of soil, often indicated by tilted fences or trees

flashcards.question: Mudflow
flashcards.answer: A rapid flow of water-saturated soil and debris, often triggered by heavy rain

flashcards.question: Angle of Repose
flashcards.answer: The steepest angle at which loose, unconsolidated material remains stable
